name: react-error-boundary
title: React Error Boundary
author: Brian Vaughn
description: Catches descendant React render failures and exposes fallback and reset APIs for recovery.

changes: Replaced import.meta.env.DEV with process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production" so the copied client source compiles in the Next host.

license.scope: lib/index.ts, lib/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx, lib/context/ErrorBoundaryContext.ts, lib/hooks/useErrorBoundary.ts, lib/types.ts, lib/utils/assertErrorBoundaryContext.ts, lib/utils/getErrorMessage.ts, lib/utils/isErrorBoundaryContext.ts, and lib/utils/withErrorBoundary.ts

modifications.reason: Use the development-mode convention supported by the Next host instead of Vite-specific import metadata.
